properties.Test Case: 1) Books with no audio (ensure pages turn after specified duration). Ensure mp3 output is disabled. Ensure video dimensions correspond to output settings.
properties.Steps: 1) Books with no audio (ensure pages turn after specified duration). Ensure mp3 output is disabled. Ensure video dimensions correspond to output settings.

properties.Test Case: 2) Talking books with multiple text box elements and image descriptions. Portrait and landscape.
properties.Steps: 2)  Talking books with multiple text box elements and image descriptions. Portrait and landscape.

properties.Test Case: Test the "Configure & Preview" 2) with an audio book like with multiple languages like this one. Select a language using the language chooser and ensure the audio plays the correct language. Note: currently, all embedded languages will be available.
